name: trendForecast
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || (Array.isArray(output.result.forecast) && output.result.forecast.every(function(f){ return Number.isFinite(f.periodsAhead) && Number.isFinite(f.predicted); }))
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'analytics.trendForecast'. Component sends {artifact:{data:{dataPoints:[{value}]}}}. Returns {trend,slope,dataPoints,lastValue,forecast:[{periodsAhead,predicted}],confidence}. POISON (real bug fixed): parseFloat('1e999')=Infinity poisoned slope/predicted → null → blank render. finNum + safeRound keep slope/lastValue/predicted FINITE and trend in {upward,downward,flat}. Pinned by server/tests/analytics-lens-macros.test.js.
